title: CGAP Human Spleen Dissociation
author: Adam Hunter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qz3dx8n

steps.title: Receive spleen punch in solution
steps.instruction: Receive spleen punch in solution.

steps.title: Place spleen punch onto 100mm Glass Petri Dish
steps.instruction: Place spleen punch onto 100mm Glass Petri Dish.

steps.title: Add 10ml Cold PBS
steps.instruction: Add 10ml Cold PBS.

steps.title: Slice spleen punch into small pieces (approximately 10x10x10mm)
steps.instruction: Slice spleen punch into small pieces (approximately 10x10x10mm).

steps.title: Transfer spleen pieces and PBS into 50ml Falcon Tube
steps.instruction: Transfer spleen pieces and PBS into 50ml Falcon Tube.

steps.title: Add 100µl DNAse I dropwise to...
steps.instruction: Add 100µl DNAse I dropwise to spleen punch in PBS to a final concentration of 100µg/ml.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5 min.

steps.title: Mash spleen through 100µM cell strainer...
steps.instruction: Mash spleen through 100µM cell strainer above a 50ml Falcon Tube using a 2.0ml syringe plunger, washing through with 10ml Cold PBS.

steps.title: Transfer to 15ml Falcon Tube
steps.instruction: Transfer to 15ml Falcon Tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 500g for 5 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 500g for 5 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Add 1ml Red Cell Lysis buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 1ml Red Cell Lysis buffer to the pellet and resuspend by racking/tapping.

steps.title: Place on ice 5 min with periodic agitation
steps.instruction: Place on ice 5 min with periodic agitation.

steps.title: Add 9ml Cold PBS
steps.instruction: Add 9ml Cold PBS.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 500g for 5 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 500g for 5 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 5ml Cold PBS with 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 5ml Cold PBS with 0.04% BSA (8µl BSA/ml PBS).

steps.title: Filter through a 100µM cell strainer...
steps.instruction: Filter through a 100µM cell strainer above a 50ml Falcon Tube.

steps.title: Wash cell strainer through with 5...
steps.instruction: Wash cell strainer through with 5 ml Cold PBS with 0.04% BSA (8µl BSA/ml PBS).

steps.title: Count cells using trypan blue and...
steps.instruction: Count cells using trypan blue and a C-Chip or the nucleocounter.

steps.title: If percentage of live cells is...
steps.instruction: If percentage of live cells is higher than 70-80%, cells can then be processed for scRNA-seq.a. If percentage of live cells is below 70-80%, remove dead cells by following “MACS Live Dead Separation”. CGAP MACS Live Dead Separation by Adam Hunter

steps.title: Dilute cells to 2x10 6 cell per ml in 0
steps.instruction: Dilute cells to 2x10 6 cell per ml in 0.04% BSA and proceed to 10X preparation for scRNA sequencing.

steps.title: Ensure all unused tissue, equipment and...
steps.instruction: Ensure all unused tissue, equipment and tubes that have been in contact with primary tissue are placed into Virkon in sweetie jar for a minimum of 1 hour. After this time aspirate and disposing in relevant sharps or waste routes.

steps.title: Perform Freezing Human Tissue in Isopentane before beginning Dissociation Protocol
steps.instruction: Perform Freezing Human Tissue in Isopentane before beginning Dissociation Protocol

steps.title: %s %s
steps.instruction: %s %s
